---
name: dashboards-reporting
description: "Use when: building programme/project dashboards, drill-down detail views, and cross-module reports with traceable source links."
---

# Dashboards and Reporting

## Goal
Deliver meaningful summaries with direct paths to details and source data.

## Do
- Build dashboard widgets from trusted aggregate queries.
- Ensure each chart/stat links to detail pages.
- Ensure each detail record can link to its source module data.
- Keep reporting filters explicit (scope, date range, status, owners).

## Checks
- Dashboard metrics are reproducible from source data.
- Empty states are clear and actionable.
- Performance remains acceptable for expected dataset sizes.
